title: Rubnong
description: Rubnong is a lively activity about building friendships. Where seniors welcome freshmen with fun activities, challenges, and team bonding.

title: OneFunDay
description: OneFunDay is a one day activity, a fun extension of the Rubnong event. Where seniors and freshmen can have fun activities together.

title: Secret Hug
description: Secret Hug pairs seniors with freshmen to guide and support them through university life, helping them feel more comfortable and connected.
